author: Peter
content: You're welcome. You can keep it or resell it on Elamite Art's Discord or another CNFT market.

author: Joonas V
content:
I received an email in which I was asked to send my Cardano wallet address but after replying I got a reply saying:

"This message was created automatically by mail delivery software.
A message that you sent could not be delivered to one or more of its
recipients. This is a permanent error. The following address(es) failed:
No Such User Here"

Where should I actually send my wallet address?

author: Peter
content: The reply-to address was incorrect and didn't exist, sorry about that, but you should have received your NFT into your wallet address. Have fun selling that one and hope you get a good price for it.
